title: Move rootless directory handling to the libpod/pkg/util directory
body:
This should allow us to share this code with buildah.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan I think the bot can't do anything with webhooks down for Github
Ok, I am going to manually merge, so that buildah can start to use these.
